title: poa caesia var. aspera
intro: Poa caesia var. aspera, commonly known as rough blue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa caesia var. aspera include its ability to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in the treatment of respiratory infections, skin conditions, and other health issues. Poa caesia var. aspera can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
